title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building the orchestration layer around coding agents that comprises approximately 98% of their effectiveness. It operates at two levels: rules and hooks within a single AI session, and multi-session orchestration that breaks complex tasks into focused workflows to enable reliable scaling of agentic systems.
